findings.evidence: `Connected.lean:128` defines `deckEquivFiberOfSurjective`; `Connected.lean:137` has the local apply lemma, while the new regular-only lemmas are at `Regular.lean:175`, `Regular.lean:183`, and `Regular.lean:207`.
findings.fix: Add local lemmas for `deckEquivFiberOfSurjective`, e.g. `deckEquivFiberOfSurjective_one`, `deckEquivFiberOfSurjective_mul`, and `deckEquivFiberOfSurjective_symm_apply_smul` with `hsurj : Function.Surjective fun φ : Deck p => φ • e`, then make the regular lemmas wrappers or remove the duplicate special cases if unused.
findings.issue: `deckEquivFiber_one`, `deckEquivFiber_mul`, and `deckEquivFiber_symm_apply_smul` are stated with `hreg : IsRegular p`, but their proofs use only that `deckEquivFiber` is evaluation at a point; the nearby local API already has `deckEquivFiberOfSurjective hp e hsurj` for exactly this level.

findings.evidence: `RegularTorsor.lean:50` defines `fiberTorsorOfPretransitive`; `RegularTorsor.lean:86` proves `fiber_sdiv_eq_ofPretransitive`; the simp lemma at `RegularTorsor.lean:102` drops back to `hreg : IsRegular p`.
findings.fix: Prove a pretransitive/local simp lemma using `fiberTorsorOfPretransitive hp b`, such as `(deckEquivFiberOfSurjective hp e (MulAction.surjective_smul (Deck p) e)).symm e' = e' /ₛ e`, and derive the regular `deckEquivFiber` version from it.
findings.issue: `deckEquivFiber_symm_eq_sdiv` is only available under `IsRegular p`, although this file already defines the local torsor `fiberTorsorOfPretransitive` and proves the corresponding local quotient characterization.

summary: Some new API is regular-cover-specific even though the same statements only need the existing local surjective-orbit/pretransitive hypotheses. Generalize those lemmas first and derive the regular versions as special cases.
